title: Amazon EKS Auto Mode | Fully Automated Kubernetes Clusters
summary: Amazon EKS Auto Mode is a fully managed Kubernetes service that provisions production-grade clusters with a single click, automating both control plane and data plane management. It combines automated operations for teams without dedicated ops staff while providing customization and control for power users.
